title: SI Send Message Request
description: Send a message to the brand agent within an active session

idempotency_key.description: Client-generated unique key for at-most-once execution. Each conversational turn is a distinct mutation of session transcript — without this key, a timeout-and-retry produces a duplicate turn and a duplicate model response. MUST be unique per (seller, request) pair. Use a fresh UUID v4 for each user turn.

message.description: User's message to the brand agent

action_response.description: Response to a previous action_button (e.g., user clicked checkout)
